name: case-solvers
description: Claude Code plugins by nadiar: workflow skills (/case, /solve) and context-writing helpers.

plugins.name: case-solvers
plugins.description: Case/solve workflow: a planning-model architect (/case) writes a budget-solver contract that a cheap solver model (/solve) executes test-first.

plugins.name: writing-claude-md
plugins.description: Skill for creating and updating CLAUDE.md and other LLM project context files. Teaches what to include, what to omit, and how to keep context lean.
